pages.text: The $(flesh)Bio-Lab$() is biomancy's brewing stand — the machine that compounds $(l:4_serums/serum_list)serums$() and the chemical $(l:4_serums/compounds)compounds$() they are built from.
pages.title: The Bio-Lab

pages.text: The $(flesh)Bio-Lab$() is grown only in the $(l:3_machines/bio_forge)Bio-Forge$() — there is no bench recipe. It takes a Living Flesh core with flesh bits, bone fragments, tough fibres and exotic dust.

$(bold)How it brews.$() A Bio-Lab recipe takes a set of $(italic)ingredients$(), a $(italic)reactant$() that drives the reaction, a $(italic)Nutrient cost$() and a processing time, and yields a serum or compound.$(br2)It is the gateway to the whole of $(l:4_serums/compounds)Serums & Compounds$() — the next chapter — and through serums it loops back to feed the Cradle.
pages.title: The Reaction
